instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger swoosh-emails.

instructions.instruction: **Define emails in separate modules** — `MyApp.Emails.UserEmail`, not inline in contexts

instructions.instruction: **Use Phoenix components for email templates** — reuse UI components in emails

instructions.instruction: **Never send emails synchronously in web requests** — use Oban for async delivery with retries and observability; use Task.start only for simple cases
instructions.original_snippets: **Never send emails synchronously in web requests** — use Oban for async delivery with retries and observability; use Task.start only for simple cases
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger swoosh-emails.

instructions.instruction: **Use `Swoosh.Preview` in development** — preview emails in the browser

instructions.instruction: Prefer Phoenix components for rich templates. Use plain `html_body/text_body` strings only for simple one-off emails.
instructions.original_snippets: Prefer Phoenix components for rich templates. Use plain `html_body/text_body` strings only for simple one-off emails.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger swoosh-emails.
